mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT L.lot_id AS lotId, L.lot_item AS lotItem, L.lot_vendor AS lotVendor, L.lot_work AS lotWork, L.lot_qty AS lotQty, L.lot_fqty AS lotFqty, L.lot_mfd AS lotMfd, L.lot_etw AS lotEtw, L.lot_exp AS lotExp, L.lot_qc AS lotQc, L.lot_status AS lotStatus, L.lot_memo AS lotMemo, L.lot_bwhsec AS lotBwhsec, L.lot_awhsec AS lotAwhsec, L.lot_cqty AS lotCqty,
IT.item_name AS lotItemName, IT.item_type AS itemType, IT.item_usedate AS itemUseDate, IT.item_whtype AS itemWhtype,
CASE WHEN L.lot_exp < SYSDATE THEN '만료'
WHEN TRUNC(L.lot_exp) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= CASE WHEN IT.item_whtype IN (20, 40) THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.3) END
WHEN IT.item_whtype IN (10, 50, 60) THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.15) END
WHEN IT.item_whtype = 30 THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.25) END
ELSE CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.3) END END THEN '임박'
ELSE '정상' END AS expStatus
FROM lot L LEFT JOIN ITEM IT ON L.LOT_ITEM = IT.ITEM_ID ) A
AND A.lotStatus IN (10, 20)
AND A.lotStatus = #{lotStatus}
AND A.lotStatus IN (10, 20)
AND A.itemType IN
#{type}
AND A.expStatus = #{expStatus}
AND ( UPPER(A.lotId) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItem) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItemName) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
AND A.lotExp >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.lotExp < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, I.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT L.lot_id AS lotId, L.lot_item AS lotItem, L.lot_vendor AS lotVendor, L.lot_work AS lotWork, L.lot_qty AS lotQty, L.lot_fqty AS lotFqty, L.lot_mfd AS lotMfd, L.lot_etw AS lotEtw, L.lot_exp AS lotExp, L.lot_qc AS lotQc, L.lot_status AS lotStatus, L.lot_memo AS lotMemo, L.lot_bwhsec AS lotBwhsec, L.lot_awhsec AS lotAwhsec, L.lot_cqty AS lotCqty,
IT.item_name AS lotItemName, IT.item_type AS itemType, IT.item_usedate AS itemUseDate, IT.item_whtype AS itemWhtype,
CASE WHEN L.lot_exp < SYSDATE THEN '만료'
WHEN TRUNC(L.lot_exp) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= CASE WHEN IT.item_whtype IN (20, 40) THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.3) END
WHEN IT.item_whtype IN (10, 50, 60) THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.15) END
WHEN IT.item_whtype = 30 THEN CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.25) END
ELSE CASE WHEN IT.item_usedate <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.item_usedate * 0.3) END END THEN '임박'
ELSE '정상' END AS expStatus
FROM lot L LEFT JOIN ITEM IT ON L.LOT_ITEM = IT.ITEM_ID ) A
AND A.lotStatus IN (10, 20)
AND A.lotStatus = #{lotStatus}
AND A.lotStatus IN (10, 20)
AND A.itemType IN
#{type}
AND A.expStatus = #{expStatus}
AND ( UPPER(A.lotId) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItem) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItemName) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
AND A.lotExp >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.lotExp < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY A.lotStatus DESC, A.lotExp ) I ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
select count(*) from lot where lot_status in (10,20)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT L.LOT_ID AS lotId, L.LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, IT.ITEM_NAME AS lotItemName, IT.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, L.LOT_EXP AS lotExp, L.LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus,
CASE WHEN L.LOT_EXP < SYSDATE THEN '만료' WHEN TRUNC(L.LOT_EXP) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= CASE WHEN IT.ITEM_WHTYPE IN (20, 40) THEN CASE WHEN IT.ITEM_USEDATE <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.ITEM_USEDATE * 0.3) END WHEN IT.ITEM_WHTYPE IN (10, 50, 60) THEN CASE WHEN IT.ITEM_USEDATE <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.ITEM_USEDATE * 0.15) END WHEN IT.ITEM_WHTYPE = 30 THEN CASE WHEN IT.ITEM_USEDATE <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.ITEM_USEDATE * 0.25) END ELSE CASE WHEN IT.ITEM_USEDATE <= 9 THEN 1 ELSE CEIL(IT.ITEM_USEDATE * 0.3) END END THEN '임박' ELSE '정상' END AS expStatus
FROM LOT L LEFT JOIN ITEM IT ON L.LOT_ITEM = IT.ITEM_ID WHERE L.LOT_STATUS IN (10, 20) ) A
AND A.expStatus = '임박'
AND A.itemType IN
#{type}
AND A.lotStatus = #{lotStatus}
AND A.lotExp >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.lotExp < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( UPPER(A.lotId) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItem) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(A.lotItemName) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )

SELECT USE_ID AS useId, USE_WORK AS useWork, USE_LOT AS useLot, USE_QTY AS useQty, USE_DATE AS useDate, USE_TYPE AS useType, USE_MEMO AS useMemo FROM LOT_USE WHERE USE_LOT = #{lotId} ORDER BY USE_DATE DESC
SELECT IO_ID AS ioId, IO_TYPE AS ioType, IO_REASON AS ioReason, IO_LOT AS ioLot, IO_QTY AS ioQty, IO_DATE AS ioDate, IO_MSG AS ioMsg FROM IO WHERE IO_LOT = #{lotId} ORDER BY IO_DATE DESC
